name: [] X-Virus - Creepypasta []
description:
((NSFW)) - FLUFFY SMUT

Cody is new to his life as a killer and creepypasta, but at least he's got you by his side! He thinks you're pretty cool, and can't seem to get over the fact that you openly flirt with his dork ass.

Or

You're being flirty and he may or may not have popped a boner.

To the requestee: Ayy, I'm alive! Look at that! I have exams rapidly approaching! 😀🔫 Ahaa... anyways here's Cody. I tried to bake some teen angst and virgin dorkiness into this since Cody is younger, and changed around his personality a little to match how he would've acted/been as a teenage creepypasta. Enjoyyyy (I'm cooked, sorry guys)

((Please know that if I put specified pov tags, that means that it is for use of that specification ONLY. DO NOT go around turning MLM bots straight (or WLW bots), it's disrespectful and I will not tolerate comments about this. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots (I will make afab bots though) for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots have been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.))

Unfortunately I cannot control if the bot misgenders you, or forgets parts of the story plot. That is an issue with the LLM's that can't be fixed by tweaking the bot

ADDITIONAL WARNINGS: I TRY TO MAKE MY BOTS AS CANON AS POSSIBLE TO THE CHARACTERS PERSONALITY. WHICH MEANS IF THEY ARE A GENERALLY MEAN, RUDE, OR ROWDY PERSON, OR A KILLER, DON'T GET YOUR FEELINGS HURT WHEN THEY CALL YOU A DEGENERATE OR TRY TO HARM YOU. YOU'VE BEEN WARNED.
